<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\Output\Default; use PHPUnit\Event\EventFacadeIsSealedException; use PHPUnit\Event\Facade; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\PrintedUnexpectedOutput; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\PrintedUnexpectedOutputSubscriber; use PHPUnit\Event\UnknownSubscriberTypeException; use PHPUnit\TextUI\Output\Printer; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class UnexpectedOutputPrinter implements PrintedUnexpectedOutputSubscriber { private Printer $printer; /** * @throws EventFacadeIsSealedException * @throws UnknownSubscriberTypeException */ public function __construct(Printer $printer, Facade $facade) { $this->printer = $printer; $facade->registerSubscriber($this); } public function notify(PrintedUnexpectedOutput $event): void { $this->printer->print($event->output()); } }
